note: THE JOIN TABLE. A THEME is one COLOR + one FEELING, named. Apps reference a THEME slug (never a raw color or feeling); it resolves to color tokens + feeling tokens. Colors live as the palette JSONs registered in _index.json; feelings live in feelings/. This file is the only place a pairing is declared.

vocabulary.color: entity — the 17-token palette (hue only). e.g. mclaren, papyrus.
vocabulary.feeling: entity — form tokens (type, radius, line weight, gradient, shadow). e.g. sharp-racing.
vocabulary.theme: JOIN — exactly one color + one feeling. The unit an app is skinned with.

themes.name: Sharp Racing · McLaren
themes.intendedUse: Reference build: the first fully-defined theme, proving the color×feeling pipeline end to end.
